hero.tagline: Building functional, interactive, and user-centric web applications.

about.name: AMIRUL HASAN
about.bio:
As an Informatics Engineering graduate and Software Engineer, I specialize in translating complex business needs into efficient web applications.

From digitizing operational workflows to architecting frontend interfaces, I thrive on building scalable full-stack solutions from the ground up that deliver real-world impact.

description: Replaced paper-based processes by developing an NG Scanning System (QR integration) and an automated Scrap Evidence document pipeline.
Architected scalable applications (Warehouse Engineering, IT Asset Management, and Help Desk) adapting to Laravel and ReactJS ecosystems.
Ensured high-speed data handling for thousands of concurrent records using advanced techniques like lazy loading in heavy-asset environments.
Revamped legacy interfaces with Tailwind CSS, delivering fully responsive and intuitive tools for both office executives and factory-floor personnel.
Transformed complex UI/UX designs into responsive, mobile-first web components with strict cross-browser compatibility.
Successfully delivered 8+ major frontend tasks within a fast-paced environment, utilizing modern frameworks to enhance platform capabilities.
Actively participated in weekly technical sprints and synchronization meetings to align development workflows with business goals.
Recognized with a Certificate of Appreciation for consistently delivering clean, maintainable code ahead of project deadlines.
